tasks.title: Xcode project scaffold: app target, widget extension target, App Group entitlement
acceptance_criteria: App target and widget extension target both build empty
App Group group.com.vervecoach.shared entitlement present in both targets
VerveCoachApp.swift is an empty SwiftUI App shell with no business logic yet

tasks.title: SwiftData schema: Scenario, PromptCard, RehearsalSession, RehearsalTurnRecord, ReflectionNote, CritiqueResult
acceptance_criteria: A fake Scenario with cards and a session round-trips through an in-memory ModelContainer in a unit test
Deleting a Scenario cascades to its PromptCards, RehearsalSessions, and their TurnRecords/ReflectionNotes

tasks.title: Cross-lane protocol contracts and RehearsalPhase state machine
acceptance_criteria: All protocols compile referencing Models types with no concrete implementation
RehearsalPhase includes explicit permission-denied case(s) and a terminal failure case, not just the happy-path cases

tasks.title: App Group snapshot contract and writer
acceptance_criteria: UpcomingScenarioSnapshot is Codable and contains only what the widget needs (title, counterpartName, scheduledFor, scenarioID)
Writer function has a documented call contract: invoked on Scenario create/edit/delete/reschedule

tasks.title: ScenarioStore concrete implementation over ModelContext
acceptance_criteria: save/fetchAll/delete work against a real ModelContext
Every save/delete call triggers ScenarioSnapshotWriter with correct data
Session-cap check (see T-008) is enforced inside save(), not left to callers

tasks.title: AudioRecordingService concrete implementation
acceptance_criteria: .m4a files are written to Application Support, not stored as blobs
startRecording/stopRecording/currentDuration behave correctly across a full record cycle in a unit test

tasks.title: SpeechRecognitionService concrete implementation
acceptance_criteria: Authorization denial surfaces as a typed result/error, never a crash
AsyncStream<String> yields incremental transcript updates in a mocked recognizer test

tasks.title: EntitlementStore concrete implementation and shared session-cap policy
acceptance_criteria: isPremium reflects StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements
RehearsalCapPolicy is the single function both manual UI and StartRehearsalIntent call to check free-tier limits
Local StoreKit configuration file exists and loads in a debug scheme

tasks.title: RuleBasedCritiqueProvider
acceptance_criteria: Detects filler words, hedging language, and response length vs. expectedResponseHint
Always returns a CritiqueResult with source == .ruleBased, never throws

tasks.title: OnDeviceLLMCritiqueProvider with availability gating
acceptance_criteria: isAvailable correctly reflects on-device model eligibility
Test suite's primary case is isAvailable == false and confirms callers fall back to RuleBasedCritiqueProvider
Never invoked as the sole critique path anywhere in the codebase

tasks.title: Onboarding flow
acceptance_criteria: Empty/loading/success/error states all present where reachable
Onboarding requests mic and speech permission with clear rationale before Rehearsal flow ever needs them

tasks.title: ScenarioSetup flow
acceptance_criteria: Builds and is navigable against a fake ScenarioStore before the real one exists
addCard/save work against the protocol; free-tier cap rejection surfaces a clear error state, not a silent failure

tasks.title: Rehearsal flow (state machine UI)
acceptance_criteria: Every RehearsalPhase case, including permission-denied and failure, has a corresponding UI state
Backgrounding or denying a permission mid-recording never leaves the UI in an inconsistent state (no half-recorded limbo)

tasks.title: Review flow
acceptance_criteria: Session history lists past RehearsalSessions with reflection notes
addReflectionNote persists and appears without requiring app restart

tasks.title: Paywall flow
acceptance_criteria: Presents when RehearsalCapPolicy rejects an action, from any entry point
Purchase/restore flows against EntitlementStore protocol, testable with a fake

tasks.title: NotificationScheduler concrete implementation
acceptance_criteria: scheduleReminder/cancelReminder work against UNUserNotificationCenter in a unit test with a mock center
Denied notification permission degrades gracefully, no crash

tasks.title: UpcomingSessionWidget
acceptance_criteria: Reads only UpcomingScenarioSnapshot from the App Group container, never opens SwiftData directly
Widget reflects a newly created Scenario after a timeline reload, not stale placeholder data

tasks.title: StartRehearsalIntent
acceptance_criteria: Calls the same RehearsalCapPolicy check as manual UI before starting a session
A free user at their cap is blocked via Siri exactly as they would be via the app UI

tasks.title: Full rehearsal loop integration test
acceptance_criteria: Record -> transcribe -> rule-based critique -> save runs end-to-end against real (non-mock) services in a test target
Resulting RehearsalTurnRecord round-trips through ScenarioStore with correct audioFilename and critique

tasks.title: Pre-ship checklist verification
acceptance_criteria: Mic/speech/notification permission-denial states verified in UI, not just unit tests
StoreKit sandbox purchase and restore both verified against VerveCoach.storekit
Widget shows a real just-created Scenario end-to-end, not stubbed data

tasks.title: Root app assembly and dependency wiring
acceptance_criteria: VerveCoachApp.swift injects concrete ScenarioStore, EntitlementStore, and both critique providers into the environment
RootView composes Onboarding -> ScenarioSetup/Rehearsal/Review/Paywall navigation without any lane's fake/stub types remaining in the shipped build
